faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Straight answers before you reach out. Need more detail? The form below is built for that.

q.projectTypes: What kinds of projects do you take on?
q.cost: How much can a project cost?
q.maintenance: Do you offer maintenance or improvements after delivery?
q.remote: Do you work with remote clients?

a.projectTypes: Websites, apps, and custom solutions—from landings and corporate sites to fuller platforms with backend, admin panels, and automations.
a.cost: It depends on scope, complexity, and your specific needs. After reviewing your idea, I’ll share a clear proposal with timelines, cost, and what’s included.
a.timeline: It varies by type of work. A landing can be ready quickly; a larger platform or app needs more planning and time.
a.maintenance: Yes—support, improvements, performance work, new features, and ongoing maintenance after launch.
a.remote: Yes. I work remotely with clear communication and steady project follow-up.

contact.title: Tell me what you need

contact.successBody: When you connect a backend, this will reach your inbox. Until then, use the email in the footer.
